creator: milios@ccsys.com
text: FYI, this same bug affects godot-4.2.1 due to its bundled embree. i will attempt an inplace fix and post a patch to that in a new PR if i'm successful. i just figured i'd chime in before i start in case i disappear because this isn't all that critical to me right now so if someone beats me to it, well please and thank you lol
